sizing_rule.note: Position sized by R multiple; exit or manage position if MAE exceeds 0.5R; max drawdown from entry capped at 33% of initial risk per trade. R multiple framework is core to Tharp's position sizing methodology.

source_rule_text: Trading success depends primarily on price movement after entry rather than entry timing; a trader should monitor and manage the maximum adverse excursion (MAE) from entry point to optimize outcome.
